description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a clean, modern exterior clad in horizontal white siding. The front facade is characterized by a large arched doorway and several symmetrically arranged rectangular windows with gray trim. The side and rear elevations continue the window pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms, which are partially visible through the open plan and large windows. The house includes multiple rooms, as indicated by the internal partition walls, and a section of wood-textured flooring is visible in one area. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or overhangs, emphasizing function and simplicity. The entryway is understated, with the main door integrated into the facade without steps, porch, or columns.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with white horizontal siding, flat roof, and symmetrical gray-trimmed windows. The front features an arched doorway and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, two sets of double windows, and a clean, symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: Side view with two windows and a glimpse into the interior layout, including visible partition walls and a section of wood-textured flooring.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying four symmetrically arranged windows and a simple, flat wall with no entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal window openings and a clear view of the internal room divisions.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door integrated into the facade, no steps, porch, or decorative elements
